# Luminary — Premium Hardware

Luminary is a premium hardware brand specializing in high-performance workspace consoles crafted from grade-5 brushed titanium, designed to elevate digital production and cognitive flow.

## Navigation
- [Home Page](index.html)
- [Products](#products)
- [Innovation](#features)
- [Connect](#connect)

## Key Products
- **Horizon Display**: A 32-inch 6K retina canvas.
- **Keyframe Core**: A CNC aluminum mechanical keyboard with haptic dampeners.
- **Acoustic Bar**: A cylindrical soundbar using active wave-guiding.

## Contact & Updates
- [Request Access](#connect)
